behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted paths (extensions.rs, experiments.rs, App.tsx, InterruptionHandler.tsx, useRecipeManager.ts, WaveformVisualizer.tsx), literal strings, and function name save_extensions_map are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's wrong and expected behavior (warn level or higher, remove files/comments) without prescribing specific code edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for removal of files/strings and presence of tracing::warn! with message content, which matches any reasonable fix; instruction allows 'warn! or higher' but test only accepts warn! — minor but acceptable since instruction explicitly mentions warn.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo check, clippy, fmt, and npx tsc as subprocesses in addition to text inspection for deletions.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub cannot satisfy file removals, missing console.logs, or warn! log upgrade; each f2p requires actual change.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the four cleanup categories in instruction has corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under Gates, Fail-to-pass, and Pass-to-pass comment sections with descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names appear consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files because localization is the task scope (cleanup of specific known files), not a bug-finding task.
